metadata.description: Checkmarx plugins for Claude Code — bridges Claude to the Checkmarx One security platform via the security-mcp server.

plugins.name: checkmarx-security-mcp
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin that connects to the Checkmarx security-mcp server. Exposes SAST, SCA, KICS, container, and secret-detection workflows: list projects/applications, trigger and monitor scans, inspect findings, and generate AI-driven remediation.
